holdings.n: iShares Core U.S. Aggregate Bond ETF

overview.description: The Overlay Shares Core Bond ETF (OVB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed to provide exposure to U.S. Investment-grade bonds combined with a U.S OVB was launched on Sep 30, 2019 and is issued by Liquid Strategies.
